Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Debra Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Meat Company, Inc., a corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: William Gee, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: SJS Ventures LLC., a limited liability company dba RICA aka Charlies; and Nabiel Nasief Musleh.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Principal $3,018.76
Interest $175.00
Fees and Costs pursuant to cost bill.
Total $3,293.76
Judgment signed in open court.
